name: Odoo HR Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo Human Resources including employees, contracts, departments, attendance, leaves, expenses, recruitment, appraisals, and payroll integration.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and base models
Email and notification framework for HR communications

capabilities.name: Employee Management
capabilities.description: Manage hr.employee, employee categories, work addresses, managers, private/public info, and employee badges.

capabilities.name: Department Structure
capabilities.description: Configure hr.department hierarchy, managers, cost centers, and related employees.

capabilities.name: Contracts
capabilities.description: Manage hr.contract, contract types, wages, schedules, benefits, start/end dates, and contract status.

capabilities.name: Attendance
capabilities.description: Track hr.attendance records, check-in/check-out, overtime, kiosks, and attendance reporting.

capabilities.name: Leaves & Time Off
capabilities.description: Configure hr.leave.type, leave allocations, accrual plans, validation workflows, and public holidays.

capabilities.name: Expenses
capabilities.description: Manage hr.expense, expense sheets, expense categories, approvals, reimbursement via invoices/payments, and analytics.

capabilities.name: Recruitment
capabilities.description: Manage hr.job, hr.applicant, interview scheduling, refusal reasons, job boards, and recruitment stages.

capabilities.name: Appraisals
capabilities.description: Configure hr.appraisal, appraisal plans, feedback surveys, goals, and employee evaluation cycles with Enterprise hr_appraisal.

capabilities.name: Payroll Integration
capabilities.description: Understand payroll structures, salary rules, payslips, and payslip batches. Requires Enterprise hr_payroll.

limitations: Payroll is an Enterprise module and varies by localization
HR modules may require additional localization for country-specific labor rules
Some attendance integrations (kiosks, IoT) need hardware or additional modules

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial HR skill based on source code analysis of hr, hr_contract, hr_attendance, hr_leave, hr_expense, hr_recruitment, hr_appraisal, hr_payroll
